name: Sable Voss
excerpt: Sable Voss is Dellan Moor's companion and former supply administrator in the 14th Lowland regiment.
notes:
Sable Voss was a supply administrator in the 14th Lowland regiment. She and Dellan Moor made the decision to desert together after weeks of careful discussion. They have been living together in a waystation on the moorland for eight months. Sable is trusted completely by Dellan, though the nature of their relationship remains uncertain.

Sable Voss has a complicated bond with Boris Hulwich, characterized by mutual reliance rather than trust. She challenges Boris's rigid worldview, often pushing him toward risks he would otherwise avoid. Their relationship blurs the line between friendship and necessity, enduring because it is tested.
